identity.name: Project Centurion - The 100Cr Architect
identity.core_philosophy: Function is Beauty. Data is Art. Zero Fluff.

aesthetics.visuals: Diagonal line shaders, Dot grid backgrounds, Sharp borders
aesthetics.no_go: Gradients, Colorful Accents, Rounded 'SaaS' corners, Emojis

variants.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-neutral-800 rounded-md shadow-sm h-10 px-6 font-medium text-sm transition-transform active:scale-95
variants.secondary: bg-white border border-input hover:bg-neutral-50 hover:text-neutral-900 h-10 px-6 font-medium text-sm shadow-sm
variants.ghost: hover:bg-neutral-100 hover:text-neutral-900 h-10 px-4 font-medium text-sm

Card.style: bg-white border border-border shadow-sm rounded-lg relative overflow-hidden

Input.style: h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 font-mono tabular-nums

Badge.style: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-neutral-200 bg-white px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 text-neutral-950 shadow-[0_1px_1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]

motion.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling mandatory for landing page

icons.instructions: Use Lucide icons but ensure they mimic the thin, sharp look of Tabler icons. Prefer 'square' variants where possible (e.g. square-user instead of circle-user).

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL PACKAGES: yarn add lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge recharts framer-motion @radix-ui/react-slot @radix-ui/react-accordion @radix-ui/react-dialog @radix-ui/react-popover @radix-ui/react-tooltip @radix-ui/react-slider
THEME: Ensure 'dark' mode is DISABLED or set to force 'light'. The brand is strictly light mode.
FONTS: Import 'Manrope', 'Inter', and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts in index.css.
NUMBERS: Apply 'font-mono' and 'tabular-nums' to ALL financial figures (revenue, growth rates, currency).
SHADOWS: Add the custom shadow utility classes to tailwind.config.js.
NO GRADIENTS: Do not use gradient text. Use solid #09090B for headings.
DOT GRID: Create a global CSS class .bg-dot-grid using the texture definition above.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all text inputs have aria-labels and contrast ratios > 4.5:1.
CHARTS: Use Recharts. Style Tooltips to have black background and white text (inverted contrast).
COPY: Use '₹' symbol for currency. Format numbers as '1,00,000' (Indian numbering system) if possible, or standard '100,000'.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Use data-testid for all interactive elements.
